dashboard.label: Priority Group Drop Monitoring Dashboard
dashboard.description: Priority Group drop monitoring with data retained for 14 days

panel.title: Priority Group Drop Increments Over Time

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="pg" | eval device_pg = device_name + ":" + pg_name | sort 0 _time device_pg | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_pg | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | timechart span=5m sum(drop_increment) as "PG Drop Increments"

panel.title: Top Priority Groups by New Drops

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="pg" | eval device_pg = device_name + ":" + pg_name | sort 0 _time device_pg | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_pg | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", sum(drop_increment) as "New Drops", latest(current_value) as "Total Drops", latest(port) as "Port", latest(priority_group) as "Priority Group" by device_name, pg_name | sort - "New Drops" | head 20 | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
